additionalFields.description: =3rd strike warning meeting for {{ $json['Name'] }} ({{ $json['Employee ID'] }}). Total late days this month: {{ $json['Monthly Late Count'] }}

values.content:
=You are an HR assistant at Growify Digital LLP. Write a professional warning email for the following employee regarding late arrivals this month.

Employee Details:
- Name: {{ $('Code in JavaScript2').item.json.name }}
- Employee ID: {{ $('Code in JavaScript2').item.json.employeeId }}
- Total late days this month: {{ $('Code in JavaScript2').item.json.monthlyLateCount }}
- Last late date: {{ $('Code in JavaScript2').item.json.lastWarningDate }}
- Strike number: {{ $json['Monthly Late Count'] }}

Write a formal but empathetic warning email. The tone should be:
- Friendly but firm for 1 late day (1st warning)
- More serious for 2 late days (2nd warning)

Include:
1. How many times they have been late this month
2. A reminder of the company punctuality policy
3. That continued tardiness will result in escalating consequences
4. An offer to discuss any issues they may be facing
5. Sign off from "HR Department, Growify Digital LLP"

Return ONLY the email body, no subject line.
